news_items.headline: Claude just got another superpower...
news_items.summary:
[Fireship · 403K views] Run any code on Google’s world-class infrastructure - https://cloud.run. Get 2 million free requests per month

Claude Design could be Anthropic's most disruptive tool since Claude Code. But can their new Opus 4.7 powered platform really turn your half-baked Figma wireframe into a production ready UI? Let's run it.

news_items.headline: How Anthropic uses Claude in Product Engineering
news_items.summary:
[Claude · 28K views] Product engineers lose hours toggling between tools and tackling subtasks one at a time. Software engineer Chuma Kabaghe shows how she uses Claude Code to onboard onto unfamiliar codebases in minutes, run autonomous testing loops, and manage parallel coding sessions, reducing context switching and shipping faster.

Check out other stories in the "How Anthropic uses Claude" series, below:

news_items.headline: Meet DESIGN.md: A new open standard for AI-generated UI
news_items.summary: [Google for Developers · 11K views] DESIGN.md is a structured text file that gives AI agents a persistent understanding of a design system. Originally introduced in Stitch, it has outgrown any single tool and is now available as an open-source draft specification.  In this video, Google Labs' David East breaks down how DESIGN.md changes the way AI interacts with design. By combining human-readable reasoning (the "why") with exact code values (the "hex codes") in a single file, DESIGN.md teaches agents to treat design tokens as sem

news_items.headline: ״פחות מ-12 חודשים מהגיוס ועד האקזיט״; עמית אסרף בראיון
news_items.summary:
[TrashTech · 4K views] השבוע בטראשטק אירחנו את עמית אסרף, שותף ומנכ״ל Koi - חברת סייבר שנרכשה על ידי פאלו אלטו נטוורקס בכ- 300-400 מיליון דולר, כ-12 חודשים בלבד אחרי הגיוס הראשון.
אסרף סיפר איך ניסוי קטן בבית קפה בדיזינגוף - תוסף מזויף הצליח להדביק 300 ארגוני ענק תוך שבוע, והביא את OpenAI כלקוח ראשון.
על מיתוס - המודל החדש של אנתרופיק והאם הוא באמת מהווה סכנה? למה דווקא עכשיו AI agents הם האיום הכי גדול על הארגון שלכם? וגם: למה עיצוב הפך להיות כל כך דרמטי לחברת סייבר?
_________________________
(00:00) - פתיחה
(01:59)

news_items.headline: Add Telephony to a Gemini Live Agent
news_items.summary:
[Google for Developers · 4K views] Thor from Google DeepMind walks through how to set up the Gemini Live API with Twilio and deploy it to Google Cloud Run, so anyone can call your Gemini voice agent from a regular phone number. Inbound and outbound calls, real-time audio streaming, and the same agent running in the browser and on the phone from a single deployment.

What's covered: Using the GenAI Python SDK Twilio example from GitHub, building inbound and outbound call handlers with FastAPI and WebSockets, handling audio format

news_items.headline: How to build apps faster with Android Studio Panda
news_items.summary:
[Google DeepMind · 3K views] This video explores the latest features in Android Studio Panda releases, making app development smarter and more efficient. Discover how AI-powered tools like the New Project Assistant and Version Upgrade Assistant streamline your workflow. Learn about enhanced agent capabilities, improved control with granular permissions, and specialized templates for car app development and generative AI.

Chapters:
0:00 - Introduction
0:13 - New project assistant
0:56 - Version upgrade assistant
1:32 - Agen
